title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology's Jeff Crume discusses security vulnerabilities in autonomous AI agents, covering issues like prompt injection and credential exposure. The analysis examines how agent autonomy, tools, and memory create attack surfaces and proposes safer usage approaches.
